Super_Channel: High-level channel grouping. Use for: broad market segmentation, strategic channel analysis
Channel: Distribution channel (Hospital, Retail, Mail, etc.). Use for: channel performance, distribution strategy, market access analysis
Product: Drug name and launch date. Use for: identifying specific medications, tracking product performance
Rx_Status: Prescription requirement. Use for: regulatory status, access restrictions, market potential
Strength: Drug dosage (e.g., 180MG). Use for: dosage analysis, clinical comparisons, formulary decisions
Biologics_Indicator: Whether drug is a biologic. Use for: specialty drug analysis, manufacturing complexity, pricing premiums
Major_Class: Therapeutic categories. Use for: therapeutic area analysis, competitive landscape, market categorization
Minor_Class: Therapeutic categories. Use for: therapeutic area analysis, competitive landscape, market categorization
AcuteChronic: Treatment duration type. Use for: therapy type analysis, patient population insights
Period: Date in YYYYMM format. Use for: time series analysis, seasonal trends, growth tracking
sales_dollars: Total revenue in USD for the period. Use for: revenue analysis, growth trends, market size calculations
units: Number of units sold. Use for: volume analysis, demand patterns, inventory planning
WAC_Price: Wholesale Acquisition Cost per unit. Use for: pricing analysis, cost comparisons, margin calculations
NSP_Price: Net Selling Price per unit after discounts. Use for: actual pricing analysis, profit margins, competitive positioning
pt_batch_id: Data processing batch identifier. Use for: data quality tracking, identifying when data was processed
